approvedBy: Steve via Codex main session overnight approval
approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight Dev-Hub intelligence build and instructed Codex to keep going, park blocked work, and prepare exact approval-bound repair packets without unsafe automation.
scopeSummary: Expose a read-only Dev Hub Scoper Schedule Boundary preflight that prepares the exact read-only schedule contract without registering, scheduling, running, or promoting Scoper work.
constraints: Do not register, schedule, run, or mutate Scoper jobs from this preflight.
Do not auto-promote Director recommendations into Scoper, backlog, Portfolio, decisions, or route destinations.
Do not create or update Scoper cards, backlog cards, Portfolio records, Current Sprint overlays, approval records, job registry rows, runtime controls, or destination records from this preflight.
Do not run extraction, source sync, provider/model calls, login, Browserbase, paid/private source work, Harlan sends, or external writes.
Keep actual Scoper scheduling behind separate exact Steve approval for the named read-only job contract.
Fail proof if the preflight schedules, registers, runs, promotes, mutates, writes externally, or presents a non-read-only/non-approval-required schedule row.
